title: Imagiknight's Delight
description: A mod that adds compatibility between Farmer's Delight foods and Imagiknight Industry.
body:
Imagiknight's Delight is a simple compatability patch between Imagiknight Industry and Farmer's Delight. Currently it adds canned versions of all the Farmer's Delight soups, stews, and other adjacent food items.



Report bugs and give feedback at imagiknightorpheus@gmail.com
